title: planner: can't select the lowest-cost index for IndexJoin in some cases
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

Use SQLs below to prepare data:
```
create table ts (idx int, code int, a int, key k(idx, code));
set @@cte_max_recursion_depth=10000;

insert into ts select * from (
  with recursive tt as (
    select 0 as idx, 0 as code, 0 as a
    union all
    select mod(a, 100) as idx, 0 as code, a+1 as a from tt where a<5000
  ) select * from tt
) tt;


create table h (idx int, code int, typ1 int, typ2 int, update_time int, key k1(idx, typ1, typ2), key k2(idx, update_time));
insert into h select * from (
  with recursive tt as (
    select 0 idx, 0 as code, 0 as typ1, 0 as typ2, 0 as update_time
    union all
    select mod(update_time, 100) as idx, 0 as code, 0 as typ1, 0 as typ2, update_time+1 as update_time from tt where update_time<5000
  ) select * from tt
) tt;

analyze table ts, h;
explain select /*+ tidb_inlj(h) */ 1 from ts inner join h on ts.idx=h.idx and ts.code=h.code
where h.typ1=0 and h.typ2=0 and h.update_time>0 and h.update_time<2 and h.code=0;
```

By default, the optimizer chose `k1(idx, typ1, typ2)` as the index of the `IndexJoin`, but actually `k2(idx, update_time)` has a much lower cost:
```
mysql> explain format='verbose' select /*+ tidb_inlj(h) */ 1 from ts inner join h on ts.idx=h.idx and ts.code=h.code
    -> where h.typ1=0 and h.typ2=0 and h.update_time>0 and h.update_time<2 and h.code=0;
+---------------------------------+-----------+-------------+-----------+------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                              | estRows   | estCost     | task      | access object                      | operator info                                                                                                         |
+---------------------------------+-----------+-------------+-----------+------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_9                    | 50.01     | 19013288.28 | root      |                                    | 1->Column#11                                                                                                          |
| └─IndexJoin_28                  | 50.01     | 19013283.28 | root      |                                    | inner join, inner:IndexLookUp_27, outer key:test.ts.idx, inner key:test.h.idx, equal cond:eq(test.ts.idx, test.h.idx) |
|   ├─IndexReader_41(Build)       | 5001.00   | 126732.01   | root      |                                    | index:Selection_40                                                                                                    |
|   │ └─Selection_40              | 5001.00   | 1267253.40  | cop[tikv] |                                    | eq(test.ts.code, 0)                                                                                                   |
|   │   └─IndexFullScan_39        | 5001.00   | 1017703.50  | cop[tikv] | table:ts, index:k(idx, code)       | keep order:false                                                                                                      |
|   └─IndexLookUp_27(Probe)       | 50.01     | 98313.71    | root      |                                    |                                                                                                                       |
|     ├─Selection_25(Build)       | 250100.01 | 14707.94    | cop[tikv] |                                    | not(isnull(test.h.idx))                                                                                               |
|     │ └─IndexRangeScan_23       | 250100.01 | 12212.44    | cop[tikv] | table:h, index:k1(idx, typ1, typ2) | range: decided by [eq(test.h.idx, test.ts.idx) eq(test.h.typ1, 0) eq(test.h.typ2, 0)], keep order:false               |
|     └─Selection_26(Probe)       | 50.01     | 20889.58    | cop[tikv] |                                    | eq(test.h.code, 0), gt(test.h.update_time, 0), lt(test.h.update_time, 2)                                              |
|       └─TableRowIDScan_24       | 250100.01 | 13403.08    | cop[tikv] | table:h                            | keep order:false                                                                                                      |
+---------------------------------+-----------+-------------+-----------+------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
10 rows in set, 1 warning (0.004 sec)

mysql> 
mysql> explain format='verbose' select /*+ tidb_inlj(h) use_index(h, k2) */ 1 from ts inner join h on ts.idx=h.idx and ts.code=h.code
    -> where h.typ1=0 and h.typ2=0 and h.update_time>0 and h.update_time<2 and h.code=0;
+---------------------------------+---------+------------+-----------+-------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                              | estRows | estCost    | task      | access object                       | operator info                                                                                                         |
+---------------------------------+---------+------------+-----------+-------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_9                    | 50.01   | 2627663.80 | root      |                                     | 1->Column#11                                                                                                          |
| └─IndexJoin_27                  | 50.01   | 2627658.81 | root      |                                     | inner join, inner:IndexLookUp_26, outer key:test.ts.idx, inner key:test.h.idx, equal cond:eq(test.ts.idx, test.h.idx) |
|   ├─IndexReader_40(Build)       | 5001.00 | 126732.01  | root      |                                     | index:Selection_39                                                                                                    |
|   │ └─Selection_39              | 5001.00 | 1267253.40 | cop[tikv] |                                     | eq(test.ts.code, 0)                                                                                                   |
|   │   └─IndexFullScan_38        | 5001.00 | 1017703.50 | cop[tikv] | table:ts, index:k(idx, code)        | keep order:false                                                                                                      |
|   └─IndexLookUp_26(Probe)       | 50.01   | 19.63      | root      |                                     |                                                                                                                       |
|     ├─Selection_24(Build)       | 50.01   | 2.77       | cop[tikv] |                                     | not(isnull(test.h.idx))                                                                                               |
|     │ └─IndexRangeScan_22       | 50.01   | 2.27       | cop[tikv] | table:h, index:k2(idx, update_time) | range: decided by [eq(test.h.idx, test.ts.idx) eq(test.h.update_time, 1)], keep order:false                           |
|     └─Selection_25(Probe)       | 50.01   | 4.18       | cop[tikv] |                                     | eq(test.h.code, 0), eq(test.h.typ1, 0), eq(test.h.typ2, 0)                                                            |
|       └─TableRowIDScan_23       | 50.01   | 2.68       | cop[tikv] | table:h                             | keep order:false                                                                                                      |
+---------------------------------+---------+------------+-----------+-------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The optimizer should chose the second plan.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
`k1`

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
v7.5.x, Master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INTEGER, description LONG VARCHAR, value DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table1(id));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Charlie', 35);
INSERT INTO test_table2 (ref_id, description, value) VALUES (1, 'Item 1', 10.50), (2, 'Item 2', 20.75), (3, 'Item 3', 30.00);
SELECT t1.name, t2.description FROM test_table1 t1 INNER JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.age > 28 AND t2.value < 25.00;
key_bug_features: Optimizer fails to select lowest-cost index for IndexJoin
